<!-- Keep PRs focused: one change per PR. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the issue it addresses. -->

Closes #

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill / agent / capability
- [ ] Docs / README
- [ ] Maintenance (refactor, chore)

## Checklist

- [ ] `claude plugin validate .` passes (and the touched plugin path)
- [ ] If a plugin changed: `version` bumped in its `plugin.json` **and** the
      matching entry in `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- [ ] README/docs updated in the same change if behavior changed
- [ ] No dishonest signal added (no badge/claim the repo can't back)
- [ ] Scope is limited to what the summary describes

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, things deliberately out of scope. -->
